If an {URI} event was emitted for `id`, the standard https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-1155#metadata-extensions[guarantees] that `value` will equal the value returned by {IERC1155MetadataURI-uri}."}},"kind":"dev","methods":{"adminMint(address,uint256,uint256)":{"params":{"amount":"Amount to mint","id":"Item ID (template ID)","to":"Recipient address"}},"balanceOf(address,uint256)":{"details":"Returns the value of tokens of token type `id` owned by `account`."},"balanceOfBatch(address[],uint256[])":{"details":"See {IERC1155-balanceOfBatch}. Requirements: - `accounts` and `ids` must have the same length."},"burnItem(address,uint256,uint256)":{"params":{"amount":"Amount to burn","from":"Address to burn from","itemId":"Item ID"}},"constructor":{"custom:oz-upgrades-unsafe-allow":"constructor"},"contractURI()":{"returns":{"_0":"Contract URI with collection metadata"}},"getItemData(uint256)":{"params":{"itemId":"Template ID (itemId = templateId in catalog system)"},"returns":{"template":"ItemTemplate struct from catalog"}},"initialize(string,address)":{"params":{"_itemCatalog":"Address of ItemCatalog contract","baseURI":"Base URI for token metadata (unused in catalog system)"}},"isApprovedForAll(address,address)":{"details":"Returns true if `operator` is approved to transfer ``account``'s tokens. See {setApprovalForAll}."},"mintItem(address,uint256,uint256)":{"params":{"amount":"Amount to mint","itemId":"Item ID (encoded ItemData)","to":"Recipient address"}},"name()":{"returns":{"_0":"Collection name"}},"owner()":{"details":"Returns the address of the current owner."},"renounceOwnership()":{"details":"Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner."},"safeBatchTransferFrom(address,address,uint256[],uint256[],bytes)":{"details":"xref:ROOT:erc1155.adoc#batch-operations[Batched] version of {safeTransferFrom}. WARNING: This function can potentially allow a reentrancy attack when transferring tokens to an untrusted contract, when invoking {IERC1155Receiver-onERC1155BatchReceived} on the receiver. Ensure to follow the checks-effects-interactions pattern and consider employing reentrancy guards when interacting with untrusted contracts. Emits either a {TransferSingle} or a {TransferBatch} event, depending on the length of the array arguments. Requirements: - `ids` and `values` must have the same length. - If `to` refers to a smart contract, it must implement {IERC1155Receiver-onERC1155BatchReceived} and return the acceptance magic value."},"safeTransferFrom(address,address,uint256,uint256,bytes)":{"details":"Transfers a `value` amount of tokens of type `id` from `from` to `to`. WARNING: This function can potentially allow a reentrancy attack when transferring tokens to an untrusted contract, when invoking {IERC1155Receiver-onERC1155Received} on the receiver. Ensure to follow the checks-effects-interactions pattern and consider employing reentrancy guards when interacting with untrusted contracts. Emits a {TransferSingle} event. Requirements: - `to` cannot be the zero address. - If the caller is not `from`, it must have been approved to spend ``from``'s tokens via {setApprovalForAll}. - `from` must have a balance of tokens of type `id` of at least `value` amount. - If `to` refers to a smart contract, it must implement {IERC1155Receiver-onERC1155Received} and return the acceptance magic value."},"setApprovalForAll(address,bool)":{"details":"Grants or revokes permission to `operator` to transfer the caller's tokens, according to `approved`, Emits an {ApprovalForAll} event. Requirements: - `operator` cannot be the zero address."},"setCatalog(address)":{"params":{"newCatalog":"Address of new ItemCatalog contract"}},"setContractURI(string)":{"params":{"newContractURI":"New contract URI (can be data URI or HTTP URL)"}},"setExternalImageBaseURI(string)":{"details":"When set, token metadata will include both:      - `image`: HTTP URL (base + id + \".png\")      - `image_data`: On-chain data URI (for purists)","params":{"base":"Base URI (e.g., \"https://xprmint.com/items_full/\")"}},"setName(string)":{"params":{"newName":"New collection name"}},"setStabilizer(address)":{"params":{"_stabilizer":"Address of CreatureStabilizer"}},"setSymbol(string)":{"params":{"newSymbol":"New collection symbol"}},"spYield(uint256)":{"params":{"itemId":"Template ID"},"returns":{"_0":"yield SP yield (1-5) based on rarity"}},"supportsInterface(bytes4)":{"details":"Returns true if this contract implements the interface defined by `interfaceId`. See the corresponding https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-165#how-interfaces-are-identified[ERC section] to learn more about how these ids are created. This function call must use less than 30 000 gas."},"symbol()":{"returns":{"_0":"Collection symbol"}},"transferOwnership(address)":{"details":"Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner."},"uri(uint256)":{"params":{"itemId":"Template ID"},"returns":{"_0":"uri JSON-encoded metadata URI"}}},"stateVariables":{"externalImageBaseURI":{"details":"When set, token metadata includes both:      - `image`: HTTP URL (base + id + \".png\") for marketplace display      - `image_data`: On-chain data URI (base64 PNG from SSTORE2) for verification      Marketplaces like Magic Eden and ApeScan use the `image` field for fast loading,      while `image_data` ensures on-chain provenance and backward compatibility."}},"title":"ItemToken1155","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{"adminMint(address,uint256,uint256)":{"notice":"Admin mint function for ops/testing"},"burnItem(address,uint256,uint256)":{"notice":"Burn an item from an address (only by stabilizer)"},"contractURI()":{"notice":"Get collection-level metadata URI (for marketplaces)"},"externalImageBaseURI()":{"notice":"External image base URI for marketplace-friendly URLs. balanceOf(address,uint256).details: Returns the value of tokens of token type `id` owned by `account`.

balanceOfBatch(address[],uint256[]).details: See {IERC1155-balanceOfBatch}. Requirements: - `accounts` and `ids` must have the same length.

params.itemId: Template ID (itemId = templateId in catalog system)

params.baseURI: Base URI for token metadata (unused in catalog system)

isApprovedForAll(address,address).details: Returns true if `operator` is approved to transfer ``account``'s tokens. See {setApprovalForAll}.

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

safeBatchTransferFrom(address,address,ui.details: xref:ROOT:erc1155.adoc#batch-operations[Batched] version of {safeTransferFrom}. WARNING: This function can potentially allow a reentrancy attack when transferring tokens to an untrusted contract, when invoking {IERC1155Receiver-onERC1155BatchReceived} on the receiver. Ensure to follow the checks-effects-interactions pattern and consider employing reentrancy guards when interacting with untrusted contracts. Emits either a {TransferSingle} or a {TransferBatch} event, depending on the length of the array arguments. Requirements: - `ids` and `values` must have the same length. - If `to` refers to a smart contract, it must implement {IERC1155Receiver-onERC1155BatchReceived} and return the acceptance magic value.

safeTransferFrom(address,address,uint256.details: Transfers a `value` amount of tokens of type `id` from `from` to `to`. WARNING: This function can potentially allow a reentrancy attack when transferring tokens to an untrusted contract, when invoking {IERC1155Receiver-onERC1155Received} on the receiver. Ensure to follow the checks-effects-interactions pattern and consider employing reentrancy guards when interacting with untrusted contracts. Emits a {TransferSingle} event. Requirements: - `to` cannot be the zero address. - If the caller is not `from`, it must have been approved to spend ``from``'s tokens via {setApprovalForAll}. - `from` must have a balance of tokens of type `id` of at least `value` amount. - If `to` refers to a smart contract, it must implement {IERC1155Receiver-onERC1155Received} and return the acceptance magic value.

setApprovalForAll(address,bool).details: Grants or revokes permission to `operator` to transfer the caller's tokens, according to `approved`, Emits an {ApprovalForAll} event. Requirements: - `operator` cannot be the zero address.

params.newContractURI: New contract URI (can be data URI or HTTP URL)

setExternalImageBaseURI(string).details: When set, token metadata will include both:      - `image`: HTTP URL (base + id + ".png")      - `image_data`: On-chain data URI (for purists)

returns._0: yield SP yield (1-5) based on rarity

supportsInterface(bytes4).details: Returns true if this contract implements the interface defined by `interfaceId`. See the corresponding https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-165#how-interfaces-are-identified[ERC section] to learn more about how these ids are created. This function call must use less than 30 000 gas.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

burnItem(address,uint256,uint256).notice: Burn an item from an address (only by stabilizer)

externalImageBaseURI().notice: External image base URI for marketplace-friendly URLs. Optional: if empty, `uri()` will fall back to fully on-chain data URIs only.

getItemData(uint256).notice: Get item data from template ID

mintItem(address,uint256,uint256).notice: Mint an item to an address (only by stabilizer)

setExternalImageBaseURI(string).notice: Set external image base URI for marketplace-friendly image URLs (owner only)

setName(string).notice: Set collection name (owner only, cosmetic only)

setSymbol(string).notice: Set collection symbol (owner only, cosmetic only)

spYield(uint256).notice: Get SP yield for an item

uri(uint256).notice: Override URI to return on-chain JSON encoding
